# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- PostgreSQL 18 system catalogs: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/catalogs.html
- PostgreSQL 18 privileges: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-priv.html
- PostgreSQL 18 schemas and search path: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-schemas.html
- PostgreSQL 18 row security: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-rowsecurity.html
- PostgreSQL 18 constraints: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-constraints.html
- PostgreSQL 18 partitioning: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/ddl-partitioning.html
- PostgreSQL 18 index catalog: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/catalog-pg-index.html
- PostgreSQL 18 monitoring statistics: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring-stats.html
